Hibernate: 
    select
        r1_0.id,
        r1_0.created_at,
        r1_0.department,
        r1_0.description,
        r1_0.is_system_role,
        p1_0.role_id,
        p1_1.id,
        p1_1.created_at,
        p1_1.description,
        p1_1.module,
        p1_1.permission_code,
        p1_1.permission_name,
        r1_0.role_abbreviation,
        r1_0.role_code,
        r1_0.role_level,
        r1_0.role_name 
    from
        roles r1_0 
    left join
        (role_permissions p1_0 
    join
        permissions p1_1 
            on p1_1.id=p1_0.permission_id) 
                on r1_0.id=p1_0.role_id 
        where
            r1_0.id=?

            r1_0.id=?

        r1_0.description,
        r1_0.is_system_role,

        p1_1.description,

        roles r1_0 
    left join
        (role_permissions p1_0 
    join
        permissions p1_1 
            on p1_1.id=p1_0.permission_id) 
                on r1_0.id=p1_0.role_id 
        where
            r1_0.id=?

Hibernate: 
    select
        r1_0.id,
        r1_0.created_at,
        r1_0.department,
        r1_0.description,
        r1_0.is_system_role,
        p1_0.role_id,
        p1_1.id,
        p1_1.created_at,
        p1_1.description,
        p1_1.module,
        p1_1.permission_code,
        p1_1.permission_name,
        r1_0.role_abbreviation,
        r1_0.role_code,
        r1_0.role_level,
        r1_0.role_name 
    from
        roles r1_0 
    left join
        (role_permissions p1_0 
    join
        permissions p1_1 
            on p1_1.id=p1_0.permission_id) 
                on r1_0.id=p1_0.role_id 
        where
            r1_0.id=?
